speaker: COUNTESS
text: Alas! And would you take the letter of her?

speaker: COUNTESS
text: Might you not know she would do as she has done

speaker: COUNTESS
text: By sending me a letter? Read it again.

speaker: STEWARD
text: I am Saint Jaques’ pilgrim, thither gone.

speaker: STEWARD
text: Ambitious love hath so in me offended

speaker: STEWARD
text: That barefoot plod I the cold ground upon,

speaker: STEWARD
text: With sainted vow my faults to have amended.

speaker: STEWARD
text: Write, write, that from the bloody course of war

speaker: STEWARD
text: My dearest master, your dear son, may hie.

speaker: STEWARD
text: Bless him at home in peace, whilst I from far

speaker: STEWARD
text: His name with zealous fervor sanctify.

speaker: STEWARD
text: His taken labors bid him me forgive;

speaker: STEWARD
text: I, his despiteful Juno, sent him forth

speaker: STEWARD
text: From courtly friends, with camping foes to live

speaker: STEWARD
text: Where death and danger dogs the heels of worth.

speaker: STEWARD
text: He is too good and fair for death and me,

speaker: STEWARD
text: Whom I myself embrace to set him free.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: Ah, what sharp stings are in her mildest words!

speaker: COUNTESS
text: Rinaldo, you did never lack advice so much

speaker: COUNTESS
text: As letting her pass so. Had I spoke with her,

speaker: COUNTESS
text: I could have well diverted her intents,

speaker: COUNTESS
text: Which thus she hath prevented.

speaker: STEWARD
text: Pardon me, madam.

speaker: STEWARD
text: If I had given you this at overnight,

speaker: STEWARD
text: She might have been o’erta’en. And yet she writes

speaker: STEWARD
text: Pursuit would be but vain.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: What angel shall

speaker: COUNTESS
text: Bless this unworthy husband? He cannot thrive

speaker: COUNTESS
text: Unless her prayers, whom heaven delights to hear

speaker: COUNTESS
text: And loves to grant, reprieve him from the wrath

speaker: COUNTESS
text: Of greatest justice. Write, write, Rinaldo,

speaker: COUNTESS
text: To this unworthy husband of his wife.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: Let every word weigh heavy of her worth

speaker: COUNTESS
text: That he does weigh too light. My greatest grief,

speaker: COUNTESS
text: Though little he do feel it, set down sharply.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: Dispatch the most convenient messenger.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: When haply he shall hear that she is gone,

speaker: COUNTESS
text: He will return; and hope I may that she,

speaker: COUNTESS
text: Hearing so much, will speed her foot again,

speaker: COUNTESS
text: Led hither by pure love. Which of them both

speaker: COUNTESS
text: Is dearest to me, I have no skill in sense

speaker: COUNTESS
text: To make distinction. Provide this messenger.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: My heart is heavy, and mine age is weak.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: Grief would have tears, and sorrow bids me speak.
